items.title: Come and see!
items.desc:
Jesus has a question for us all: what are you really looking for? 
 His answer: come and see! 
 Look at my life, lived for God and for others, my life for you. 
 God and the spiritually satisfying life is found not through rituals, religion (traditional or otherwise) or rules. Neither is God found in a spiritual path of your own choosing or awakening. 
 It is found in the person of Jesus: come and see!
items.rawHtml:
Jesus has a question for us all: what are you really looking for?

His answer: come and see!

Look at my life, lived for God and for others, my life for you.

God and the spiritually satisfying life is found not through rituals, religion (traditional or otherwise) or rules. Neither is God found in a spiritual path of your own choosing or awakening.

It is found in the person of Jesus: come and see!

items.title: Come and See 2: Jesus and the Sceptic
items.desc: Nathaniel responds to the invitation come and See! People are needed to extend the invitation. He meets Jesus a sceptic and ends a believer.
items.rawHtml: Nathaniel responds to the invitation come and See! People are needed to extend the invitation. He meets Jesus a sceptic and ends a believer.
